hooks.command: read -r json; f=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; cd /Users/hyerin/hyerin_project && git add "$f" && git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git commit -m "auto: update $(basename $f)" && git push origin main
